pr.title: Bump SDK packages to v1.23.0
pr.body:
## Automated Version Bump

This PR updates the following packages to version **1.23.0**:
- `openhands-sdk`
- `openhands-tools`
- `openhands-agent-server`

### Changes
- Updated SDK packages in `pyproject.toml` with exact pins
- Regenerated `poetry.lock` with the target repo's Poetry version
- Regenerated `enterprise/poetry.lock` so its transitive SDK pins match the root
- Regenerated `uv.lock` to match the updated SDK versions
- Updated `AGENT_SERVER_IMAGE` to `1.23.0` in `sandbox_spec_service.py`
- Updated mypy `additional_dependencies` pins in `.pre-commit-config.yaml`

**Triggered by:** Release of [software-agent-sdk v1.23.0](https://github.com/OpenHands/software-agent-sdk/releases/tag/v1.23.0)

---
_This PR was automatically created by the version-bump-prs workflow._

---

To run this PR locally, use the following command:

GUI with Docker:
```
docker run -it --rm   -p 3000:3000   -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock   --add-host host.docker.internal:host-gateway   --name openhands-app-8c945da   docker.openhands.dev/openhands/openhands:8c945da
```
pr.author: all-hands-bot
